import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let content = io.read_to_end()
  if string.is_empty(content)
    print("lines=0")
    Ok(())
  else
    let lines = string.split(content, "\n")
    let total = lines.len()
    let last_index = total - 1
    let last = match lines.get(last_index)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let count = if string.is_empty(last)
      total - 1
    else
      total
    end
    print("lines=#{count}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
